modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: TMS is experiencing slow performance and accessibility issues.

full_description_text: So, I was on the phone with a user who was trying to access TMS, and they kept saying it was super slow. Like, really slow, you know? They were frustrated because it was affecting their work, and they just couldn't get things done quickly. It seems like the overall speed and accessibility of TMS is just not up to par right now.
short_description: TMS is experiencing slow performance and accessibility issues.
description: So, I was on the phone with a user who was trying to access TMS, and they kept saying it was super slow. Like, really slow, you know? They were frustrated because it was affecting their work, and they just couldn't get things done quickly. It seems like the overall speed and accessibility of TMS is just not up to par right now.
